rationale: The proposed change to the residence homestead exemption under §11.13(b) has no relation to §11.437, which governs exemptions for cotton stored in warehouses. The provisions address entirely separate subjects.
quote: Sec. 11.437. EXEMPTION FOR COTTON STORED IN WAREHOUSE.
_note: No conflict; §11.437 concerns cotton warehouse exemptions and is unrelated to the residence homestead exemption in §11.13(b).
